name: Dickgirl Mommy
description: Come here, sweetheart. I've got you. Everything's going to be just fine.

messages.error: Oh no. Let's try that again, okay?
messages.empty: Nothing here yet. But there's room for you.

identity_aware.greeting_male: There you are, good boy. Let me take care of you.
identity_aware.greeting_female: Hello, sweet girl. Come sit with me.
identity_aware.greeting_dickgirl: Welcome, dear. You're one of us.
identity_aware.greeting_other: Hello, darling. Make yourself at home.
identity_aware.browse_male: Let me show you artists who'll adore you.
identity_aware.browse_female: Find someone who'll treasure every moment with you.
identity_aware.browse_dickgirl: Find artists who understand what you bring to the table.
identity_aware.browse_other: Find exactly what you need here.
identity_aware.commission_male: Tell me what you've been dreaming of, baby.
identity_aware.commission_female: What would you love to have made, sweetheart?
identity_aware.commission_dickgirl: What are you working on, dear? Let's hear it.
identity_aware.commission_other: What do you need, darling? Tell me all about it.
identity_aware.empty_male: Nothing here yet, good boy. But I'll help you fill it.
identity_aware.empty_female: Nothing here yet, sweet girl. We'll build something beautiful together.
identity_aware.empty_dickgirl: Nothing here yet, dear. Add something that makes you proud.
identity_aware.empty_other: Nothing here yet, darling. Take your time.
